market_pulse: EDC Week dominates Vegas nightlife; LIV and Encore leading dayclub lineups with Tiësto, David Guetta, Calvin Harris; Zouk & OMNIA maintaining steady EDM presence.

content_gaps.description: Latin/Reggaeton integration in weekend lineups, particularly Latin Sundays (#deseolatinsundays) gaining traction at OMNIA but underutilized across LIV's content calendar
content_gaps.suggested_action: Develop Latin-crossover weekend content series for LIV; test with TikTok creators targeting 21-30 Latin American demographic

content_gaps.description: None of the major nightclubs are running consistent BTS content from DJ booth angles, green room access, or setup footage during EDC Week—high-engagement opportunity
content_gaps.suggested_action: Capture raw BTS footage during LIV Nightclub EDC sets (Tiësto, David Guetta); post to Stories/Reels with crew tags for 24-48h amplification

content_gaps.description: @globeth0tter and other mid-tier travel creators reviewing LIV experience are getting 500-600k views per video but not formally partnered; organic reach untapped
content_gaps.suggested_action: Reach out to @globeth0tter and similar Vegas travel creators; offer guest list + bottle service in exchange for authentic review content

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest list attendee with 591 likes; travel creator with strong Vegas audience. EDC Week content driver.

Performing LIV Beach SUNDAY MAY 17; multiple TikTok posts about attending his set; confirmed high ticket velocity.
